```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(networkD3)
library(here)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(htmltools)
library(webshot2)

# Load FHReD (same sheet as 14)
future <- read_xlsx(
  here("data/FHReD_2015_future_dams_Zarfl_et_al_beta_version/FHReD_2015_future_dams_Zarfl_et_al_beta_version.xlsx"),
  sheet = 2
)

# ── Wrangle — same basins as 14 panel 02 ───────────────────────────────────────

basin_mw <- future %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Capacity (MW)`), !is.na(`Major Basin`)) %>%
  mutate(basin = coalesce(`Major Basin`, "Other")) %>%
  group_by(basin) %>%
  summarise(mw = sum(`Capacity (MW)`, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(mw))

top_basins <- basin_mw %>% slice_head(n = 6) %>% pull(basin)

basin_tab <- future %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Capacity (MW)`)) %>%
  mutate(
    basin = coalesce(`Major Basin`, "Other"),
    basin_group = if_else(basin %in% top_basins, basin, "Other basins")
  ) %>%
  group_by(basin_group) %>%
  summarise(mw = sum(`Capacity (MW)`, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(mw))

# ── Build nodes & links (add total future full column for long layout) ─────────

trunk_node   <- data.frame(name = "Total future hydropower")
total_full   <- data.frame(name = "Total future")  # full column
basin_nodes  <- data.frame(name = unique(basin_tab$basin_group))

nodes <- bind_rows(trunk_node, total_full, basin_nodes)
nodes$id <- seq_len(nrow(nodes)) - 1

get_id <- function(nm) nodes$id[nodes$name == nm]
total_mw <- sum(basin_tab$mw)

# Links: trunk → total full column → basins
links_tier1 <- data.frame(
  source = get_id("Total future hydropower"),
  target = get_id("Total future"),
  value  = total_mw
)
links_tier2 <- basin_tab %>%
  mutate(
    source = get_id("Total future"),
    target = map_int(basin_group, get_id),
    value  = mw
  ) %>%
  select(source, target, value)

links <- bind_rows(links_tier1, links_tier2) %>%
  mutate(across(c(source, target), as.integer))

# ── Plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

sn <- sankeyNetwork(
  Links       = as.data.frame(links),
  Nodes       = as.data.frame(nodes),
  Source      = "source",
  Target      = "target",
  Value       = "value",
  NodeID      = "name",
  units       = "MW",
  fontSize    = 12,
  nodeWidth   = 25,
  nodePadding = 15,
  sinksRight  = TRUE,
  width       = 1000,  # long layout
  height      = 400
)

sn <- htmlwidgets::onRender(sn, '
  function(el, x) {
    d3.select(el).selectAll(".node rect")
      .style("fill", "black")
      .style("stroke", "none");
    d3.select(el).selectAll(".node text")
      .style("font-family", "sans-serif")
      .style("font-size", "11px");
    d3.select(el).selectAll(".link")
      .style("stroke", "#555")
      .style("stroke-opacity", 0.4);
  }
')
sn
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
saveWidget(sn, here("hydropower_sankey.html"), selfcontained = TRUE)

webshot2::webshot(
  here("hydropower_sankey.html"),
  here("hydropower_sankey.pdf"),
  vwidth  = 1200,
  vheight = 500,
  zoom    = 0.5,
  delay   = 2,
  expand  = c(400, 600, 400, 600)  # top, right, bottom, left whitespace in pixels
)
```
